Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class CspTrustedSite

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.CspTrustedSite
public class CspTrustedSite extends Metadata

Java class for CspTrustedSite complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CspTrustedSite">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="context" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CspTrustedSiteContext" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="endpointUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="isApplicableToConnectSrc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isApplicableToFontSrc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isApplicableToFrameSrc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isApplicableToImgSrc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isApplicableToMediaSrc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isApplicableToStyleSrc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mobileExtension" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
